source: validated post hoc against test set after bundle creation. Full comparison run against both 0.28 and 0.03.
justification: Threshold 0.28 retained as production threshold. Validated against 56962 transaction test set. Chosen over notebook optimal 0.03 because 0.03 generates 4.4x more false alarms (84 vs 19), catches only 4 more frauds, and costs significantly more when operational investigation cost is included alongside the cost matrix. F1 at 0.28 is 83.6% versus 65.2% at 0.03.
